channel.title: PR Primespot – U.S. Breaking News, Politics and Business
channel.description: Stay updated with U.S. breaking news, politics, business, tech, and investigations, with real-time coverage, trusted analysis, and essential daily insights

item.title: FBI Says It Foiled Plot Targeting White House UFC Event Attended by Trump
item.description:
Federal authorities say they disrupted an alleged plot involving drones and firearms targeting a UFC event at the White House attended by President Donald Trump and other high-profile guests.
Read the full article: https://www.prprimespot.com/investigation/fbi-foils-white-house-ufc-event-attack-plot
